name: Apple and Raspberry Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour juices into a 6-8 quart kettle.
2. Measure sugar into a separate bowl.
3. Add the Sure-Jell and butter to juices. Bring mixture to a full rolling boil over high heat, stirring constantly.
4. Quickly stir sugar into juices and bring the mixture back to a full rolling boil. Boil for 1 minute while stirring constantly.
5. Mixture will rise to within 2 inches of the top of the pan, so make sure you stir continuously.
6. Remove from the heat and skim off foam with a spoon.
7. Fill jars leaving 1/8 inch from the top. Wipe jar rims then cover with flat lids.
8. Screw lids on tightly. Use a water bath to finish sealing.
(Note: This recipe was a prize winner at the 1994 Del Mar, CA county fair.)
